testcase.name: test_sample_file_text_reads_legacy_xls_via_conversion

failure.message: AssertionError: expected distinctive xls token in sample, got: '' assert 'PANJIT-XLS-TOKEN-771' in ''

testcase.failure: tests/test_orchestrator_context_detection.py:571: in test_sample_file_text_reads_legacy_xls_via_conversion assert token in sample, f"expected distinctive xls token in sample, got: {sample!r}" E AssertionError: expected distinctive xls token in sample, got: '' E assert 'PANJIT-XLS-TOKEN-771' in ''
